reason: Using retinoids with AHAs in the same routine may increase dryness and irritation.
Layering retinoids with BHAs may increase irritation for some users.
Benzoyl peroxide may reduce some retinoids’ effectiveness and increase irritation. Use at different times unless directed otherwise.
Combining multiple exfoliating acids can over-exfoliate and compromise the skin barrier.
Vitamin C and sunscreen are commonly paired for daytime antioxidant and UV support.
Barrier-supporting ingredients can help buffer dryness commonly associated with retinoids.
Hydrators can complement exfoliating acids by supporting skin comfort.
